html:
Exclusive to:

See also: Beefalo Skins

The Beefalo Grooming Station is a craftable Structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It is found in the Decorations Filter and Beefalo Riding Filter, requiring two Beefalo Wool, four Boards, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows players to dress up their bonded Beefalo with various skins. The Beefalo has to be hitched to the station first.

Contents

  • 1 Trivia
  • 2 Gallery

Trivia

  • The Beefalo Grooming Station was introduced in the Year of the Beefalo.
    • Despite this, it was subsequently removed from the event. Grooming Station Kit could be crafted for 8 Gold Nugget and 2 Boards on Beefalo Shrine. Its kit remains in the game files and you can spawn it using its spawn code "beefalo_groomer_item"

Gallery

  • Grooming Station Kit in the Year of the Beefalo.
  • Grooming Station Kit icon
  • Grooming Station Kit Dropped
  • Beefalo Skin test (Found in June 2023 Don't Starve: NewHome beta test.)
  • Beefalo Skin test
  • Beefalo Skin texture
  • Beefalo Grooming Station Burnt

It is found in the Decorations Filter and Beefalo Riding Filter, requiring two Beefalo Wool, four Boards, and an Alchemy Engine to prototype. It allows players to dress up their bonded Beefalo with various skins. The Beefalo has to be hitched to the station first.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Beefalo Grooming Station was introduced in the Year of the Beefalo.
Despite this, it was subsequently removed from the event. Grooming Station Kit could be crafted for 8 Gold Nugget and 2 Boards on Beefalo Shrine. Its kit remains in the game files and you can spawn it using its spawn code "beefalo_groomer_item"

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Trạm Chải Lông Bò Lai là một Kiến trúc khả chế dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó được tìm thấy trong Bộ lọc Trang trí và Bộ lọc Cưỡi Bò Lai, yêu cầu hai Lông Bò Lai, bốn Ván Ép và một Máy Luyện Kim để tạo nguyên mẫu. Nó cho phép người chơi mặc trang phục Bò Lai ngoại quan của mình với nhiều loại da khác nhau. Bò Lai phải được kéo đến trạm trước.

The '''Beefalo Grooming Station''' is a craftable [[Structure]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It is found in the [[Decorations Filter]] and [[Beefalo Riding Filter]], requiring two [[Beefalo Wool]], four [[Boards]], and an [[Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. It allows players to dress up their [[Beefalo Bell|bonded]] Beefalo with various [[Beefalo Skins|skins]]. The Beefalo has to be hitched to the station first.

* The Beefalo Grooming Station was introduced in the ''[[Year of the Beefalo]]''.
** Despite this, it was subsequently removed from the event. Grooming Station Kit could be crafted for 8 [[Gold Nugget]] and 2 [[Boards]] on [[Beefalo Shrine]]. Its kit remains in the game files and you can spawn it using its spawn code "beefalo_groomer_item"
